sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115073" key="xudaiologi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῠδαιολογία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n115073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vulgar language, coarseness,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg001:p.56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Bibl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.56</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
